source_quote: Table 2: Changes in ANB angle after treatment - Group 1 (600g chin cup): 2.5 +/- 0.51 (n=20), Group 3 (control): 0.50 +/- 0.52 (n=10). Group 2 (300g): 2.40 +/- 0.50 (n=20). Means with same superscripted letters are not significantly different at P<.05.

Table 2: Changes in Wits appraisal after treatment - Group 1 (600g chin cup): 4.60 +/- 1.23 (n=20), Group 3 (control): -0.20 +/- 0.42 (n=10). Group 2 (300g): 4.90 +/- 1.41 (n=20). Means with same superscripted letters are not significantly different at P<.05.

Table 5: Changes in ANB during study period (T2-T1) - RME-RTB (RTBLP-RME): 3.08 +/- 1.55 (n=13), Control: -0.58 +/- 0.49 (n=13). RME-FM: 2.04 +/- 1.08 (n=13). p=0.003** (overall). RME-RTB vs RME-FM p=0.064.

Table 5: Changes in Wits appraisal (mm) during study period (T2-T1) - RME-RTB (RTBLP-RME): 4.23 +/- 2.03 (n=13), Control: -1.04 +/- 0.72 (n=13). RME-FM: 2.38 +/- 1.38 (n=13). p=0.007** (overall). RME-RTB vs RME-FM p=0.005**.

Table 3: Treatment changes (T1-T2) in Overjet - MSI/FM: -6.19 +/- 1.75 (n=20), RME/FM: -5.79 +/- 1.13 (n=23). Diff=-0.40, t=-0.58, NS. Tables 4-5 confirm: MSI/FM overjet changed from -3.19 to 3.00 mm, RME/FM from -2.81 to 2.98 mm. Values reported as absolute improvement (sign reversed from original T1-T2 convention).

Table 3: Treatment changes (T1-T2) in ANB angle - MSI/FM: -4.37 +/- 1.73 (n=20), RME/FM: -4.42 +/- 1.73 (n=23). Diff=0.06, t=0.07, NS. Table 4: MSI/FM ANB from -3.60 to 0.77 degrees. Table 5: RME/FM ANB from -3.83 to 0.59 degrees. Values reported as absolute improvement (sign reversed from original T1-T2 convention).

Table 3: Treatment changes (T1-T2) in Wits appraisal - MSI/FM: -4.83 +/- 3.01 (n=20), RME/FM: -5.33 +/- 2.90 (n=23). Diff=0.50, t=0.36, NS. Table 4: MSI/FM Wits from -8.16 to -3.32 mm. Table 5: RME/FM Wits from -10.41 to -5.08 mm. Values reported as absolute improvement (sign reversed from original T1-T2 convention).
